Idaho Fish and Game

  1. Home
  2. Fishing
  3. Chinook Salmon Fishing
  4. Chinook Fishing Seasons and Rules

Spring Chinook Fishing Seasons and Rules

Resource

2026 Spring Chinook Seasons & Rules

– Full brochure, 1-8 Page(s) [PDF, 0.58 MB] Download Document

Spring Season Status

Click on the stream sections below for further information.

Snake River
Location Season Status Season Dates*
Snake River - Dug Bar to Hells Canyon Dam (Spring 2026)
Open
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
Clearwater River
Location Season Status Season Dates*
Mainstem Clearwater River - Camas Prairie Railroad Bridge to South Fork Clearwater River (Spring 2026)
Open, limited days per week
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
North Fork Clearwater River - Mouth to Dworshak Dam (Spring 2026)
Open, limited days per week
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
South Fork Clearwater River - Mouth to Confluence of American and Red rivers (Spring 2026)
Open
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
Middle Fork Clearwater River - South Fork Clearwater River to Confluence of Lochsa and Selway rivers (Spring 2026)
Open, limited days per week
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
Salmon River
Location Season Status Season Dates*
Lower Salmon River - From the Rice Creek Bridge upstream to Shorts Creek (Spring 2026)
Open, limited days per week
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
Little Salmon River - Mouth to HW95 Bridge near Pollock Road (Spring 2026)
Open, limited days per week
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
Lochsa River
Location Season Status Season Dates*
Lochsa River - Lowell Bridge to Twin Bridges (Spring 2026)
Open
4/25/26 to 8/10/26 *
* Dates are subject to change at any time. Check back for current status.

Spring Season Status

Click on the stream sections below for further information.

* Dates are subject to change at any time. Check back for current status.
The Rules Brochures

Online rules brochures are shared here in PDF file format. They are produced to keep the online display as close as possible to the printed version. However, the online version will be updated for significant changes, corrections, or updates to seasons and rules when deemed appropriate.

Printed copies of the seasons and rules brochure can be picked up, without charge, at IDFG Headquarters or Regional Offices, or by calling 208-334-3700 to receive a copy by mail.

To view Idaho Fish and Game administrative rules and code, visit the Office of Administrative Rules on the Idaho Department of Administration website.

To advertise in future Idaho Fish and Game seasons and rules large brochures, call: Rotary Offset Press at 1-253-216-1256.

Fishing Hours

Fishing for Chinook Salmon is lawful only during the hours shown in the table below.

DatesPacific Daylight TimeMountain Daylight Time
 BeginEndBeginEnd
April 27 to May 315:00 AM9:00 PM6:00 AM10:00 PM
June 1 to August 104:30 AM9:00 PM5:30 AM10:00 PM
